session.user: Change to repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and execute: make fast-ci. Report all output including pass/fail status for each check.
session.assistant: I'll execute the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report all output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci to execute fast CI checks

session.assistant:
All checks passed successfully. Here's the summary:
**make fast-ci Results: ALL PASSED**
| Check | Status | Details | |-------|--------|---------| | Lint | PASSED | All checks passed | | Format Check | PASSED | 1742 files already formatted | | Prettier Check | PASSED | All matched files use Prettier code style | | Markdown Check | PASSED | (No issues reported) | | Exec Reference Check | PASSED | .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date | | Type Check (ty) | PASSED | All checks passed | | Unit Tests (erk) | PASSED | 5920 passed in 15.16s | | Unit Tests (erk-dev) | PASSED | 138 passed in 5.85s | | Unit Tests (erk-statusline) | PASSED | 123 passed in 0.90s | | Unit Tests (erk-mcp) | PASSED | 50 passed | | AGENTS.md Standard | PASSED | All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired (19 files checked, 0 violations) |
**Total: All 10+ checks passed with no errors or violations.**
